name: Bert's Mega Mall
signals: Self-described as the largest multi-brand powersports dealer in California
Active social presence with weekly inventory drops; 200+ vehicles photographed monthly
Service department handles 12+ brands, signals deep parts and tech investment
Financing partnerships visible on site: Synchrony, Sheffield, FreedomRoad
Hosts dealer events; recently ran a Sea-Doo demo weekend
aboutCopy: Family-owned since 1965. Bert's started as a single-brand Honda shop in Covina and grew into one of the largest multi-line powersports dealers on the West Coast. Three generations of the same family operate the store today.
